output_payload.due_diligence_level: simplified — Art. 13 EUDR (risk assessment; no mitigation measures if negligible deforestation risk)

output_payload.due_diligence_level: enhanced — Art. 14 EUDR (full due diligence + additional consultation with competent authorities)
output_payload.commission_delegated_act_note: Country benchmark list subject to Commission delegated act under EUDR Art. 29 — verify against published classification before filing.

output_payload.due_diligence_level: full (default until country classified by Commission delegated act)
